title: Computing Power Increases by 10 Times! Google Secretly Developing Frozen Chips for Gemini Large Model Upgrade
excerpt: Facing increasing pressure from the shortage of AI computing power, Google is secretly developing a new specialized server chip codenamed Frozen v2. The core br
content_html:
Facing increasing pressure from the shortage of AI computing power, Google is secretly developing a new specialized server chip codenamed Frozen v2. The core breakthrough of this chip lies in directly embedding the underlying computing logic of the Gemini large model into the hardware, thereby significantly improving the chip's computational efficiency.

Revamping the Architecture to Reshape the Computing Ecosystem

According to the research team's calculations, the processing performance per unit of power after the deployment of Frozen v2 will reach 6 to 10 times that of Google's latest self-developed chip. This design, which directly etches software algorithms into silicon, can significantly reduce data movement and logical judgment steps, achieving a qualitative improvement in energy efficiency.

Different from general-purpose chips such as NVIDIA GPUs or Google TPUs, this specialized chip is specifically designed for the Gemini architecture as an integrated hardware-software solution. It not only greatly shortens AI response time but also supports more complex new application scenarios. It is expected to be deployed as early as 2028.

Positioned as an Experimental Platform, Not a Replacement for TPU

Although it demonstrates strong performance, Google does not plan to fully replace existing TPU chips with Frozen chips. Instead, the two will complement each other in the future. Due to the embedded algorithm logic, this chip requires the Gemini model to continue using a specific basic architecture, thus having a certain level of technical specialization.

Currently, Google positions it as a technology testing platform, used to accumulate engineering experience for the next generation of more specialized AI chips. Due to the limited initial production scale, the chip will mainly serve internal specific needs and will not be widely launched on the market at this stage.

content_html_zh:
面对日益严峻的AI算力短缺压力，谷歌正在秘密开发一款代号为Frozen v2的新型专用服务器芯片。 该芯片的核心突破在于将Gemini大模型的底层计算逻辑直接嵌入到硬件中，从而显着提升芯片的计算效率。

改造架构重塑计算生态

根据研究团队的计算，部署Frozen v2后单位功率的处理性能将达到谷歌最新自研芯片的6至10倍。 这种将软件算法直接蚀刻到硅片上的设计，可以显着减少数据移动和逻辑判断步骤，实现能效的质的提升。

与 NVIDIA GPU 或 Google TPU 等通用芯片不同，这款专用芯片是专为 Gemini 架构设计的软硬件集成解决方案。 不仅大大缩短了AI响应时间，还支持更复杂的新应用场景。 预计最早将于 2028 年部署。

定位为实验平台，而非 TPU 的替代品

尽管展示了强大的性能，但谷歌并不打算用 Frozen 芯片完全取代现有的 TPU 芯片。 相反，两者在未来将会相辅相成。 由于嵌入了算法逻辑，该芯片要求Gemini模型继续使用特定的基础架构，从而具有一定的技术专业化程度。

目前，谷歌将其定位为一个技术测试平台，用于为下一代更专业的AI芯片积累工程经验。 由于初期生产规模有限，该芯片将主要满足内部特定需求，现阶段不会广泛投放市场。
